subject: A cloaked humanoid figure holds a blade in a dark environment with ghostly figures visible in the background
description: A tall humanoid figure in a large feathered or leafed cloak stands in a dark, misty environment with glowing green accents throughout the foliage. The figure holds a narrow blade in one hand, lowered and angled downward, with a composed, slightly downcast gaze. The cloak's collar rises dramatically around the figure's head, framing their face. In the background, ghostly white-gray armored figures are visible but indistinct. The palette is dominated by dark greens, blacks, and muted grays, with a few teal-green glowing accents among the leaves or feathers. The tone is measured menace — a killer in repose.
foreground: cloaked humanoid figure holding a blade with downward gaze
background: dark misty environment with ghostly armored figures
emotion: cold composure — not threatening but unmistakably dangerous
